productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girl's Viona Pack of 3 Tee Infant Kidswear
description: CompositionSet of three tops made of 100% cottontop 1- Coral pink top with cap sleeves, white piping around  neckline and sleeves and white flower print on the chestTop 2- Coral pink and white striped top with cap sleeves, eyelet closure on the back, pink piping around neckline and sleeves, and embroidered logo on the left chest in black threadTop 3- White top with cap sleeves, with coral pink piping around the sleeves and neckline, and coral pink graphic on the left chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Indulge your little one in the spirit of spring with these three tees in white and coral pink from gini and jony. Mix and match these with denim shorts or small white pekoed skirts and crocs footwear when you take her out next time. The soft cotton fabric will keep her feeling fresh and comfortable all day long while she enjoys herself with no cares.
